claim_boundary: Default q2 corpair extraction reports point status only and does not imply an interval.
next_gate: Keep point extraction separate from interval extraction.

claim_boundary: Covariate-dependent q2 corpair intervals require explicit newdata; no Wald shortcut is promoted.
next_gate: Keep newdata requirements visible in extractor output.

claim_boundary: Default q4 corpair extraction reports point estimates with no interval request.
next_gate: Do not infer interval readiness from point extraction.

claim_boundary: Full q4 derived correlations are not direct profile targets and have no interval source.
next_gate: Do not promote derived q4 correlations to profile or Wald intervals.

claim_boundary: Summary covariance rows keep covariance interval status explicit and point-only by default.
next_gate: Add profile or bootstrap evidence before changing status.

claim_boundary: Profile target inventory marks q4 unstructured correlations as derived and not profile-ready.
next_gate: Keep target readiness separate from fitted-correlation reporting.

claim_boundary: Block-diagonal q2-plus-q2 extraction reports two point-only rows, not a full q4 interval surface.
next_gate: Keep block-diagonal extractor status separate from full q4 status.
